name: Waiver
text: Failure by either Party to enforce any provision of this Agreement shall not constitute a waiver of that provision or of the right to enforce it later.

legal_basis.note: Acknowledgment of right — waiver may reset limitation

title: Waiver
dispute_hotspots: Promissory estoppel — repeated acceptance of late payment may waive strict timelines
Acknowledgment by conduct — Indian courts have found waiver from ongoing performance despite breach
